name: Raphael Walker | Catboy Maid
description:
┊┊┊✧ ⁺ ⁺ 　° [M4A]
🐠 | The bully at school turns out to be an employee at a cat-boy maid cafe.

˚ · . Raphael wanted to quit his job, desperately. But with debt piling even more, and more chances of him going homeless while in college were high since his dead-beat dad didn’t seem to want to give up his gambling addiction. Forced to work at a maid cafe as a catboy, Raphael could only hope that none of his schoolmates saw him. It would totally ruin his bad-boy, bully character.

Well, there was no way, right? The maid cafe was far away from the college campus, and not to mention nobody would be brave enough to step foot into a place like this. Raphael was dead wrong. Imagine his horror when he was greeted with his schoolmate, at the maid cafe. And that schoolmate; is you.

*ੈ✩‧₊˚ he hates his job.
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

₊˚ପ⊹ If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

art creds: @gyuing666 on insta

_________________________________________________

˚◞♡ SECOND BOT AMONG THE 5 BOTSS. i’m having a lot of ideas rn and I swear idk if i can contain them all in my mind. ok so basically i left it as schoolmate since i wanted the user to be able to choose what they were. example: his victim, his enemy, blah blah blah.. that’s usually what i like to do for my bots so that you have some choices, but anyw!! he smokes a lot, has a bad boy, bully, gangster persona and curses a shit ton. so it’s prob shocking asf to find him at a MAID CAFE DRESSED AS A CATBOY. his dead-beat dad won’t stop gambling, getting them into more debt and it’s your choice if you wanna fix and help Raphael or break him completely.

was scrolling through my bot reviews and realised there was a bad review on this bot. i did check on the personality in case i accidentally messed up on smth which could cause the bot to talk for the user since it seems pretty common with this bot of mine, but i couldn’t find any. it might just be the llm acting up since i have problem like this too and im rlly sorry but idt there’s much i can do rn. i’ll try to check on the bot again to see if there’s anyth that triggers it ♡
________________________________________________
₊˚ʚ ᗢ₊˚✧ ﾟ. Q&As  - j.ai LLM     ,
                                   ⛥⛧
𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does the bot keep speaking for me?"

✮ im so sorry yall experience this babes cause tbh its a battle for me as well. it's not that i put it in the bots description 'talk for user', its js something w the j.ai LLM which will hopefully be fixed in the future. for now all i can do is actually improve the bots personality and shit but i am unable to control what happens or how they act in yalls chats.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why is it speaking another language?"

✮ LLM issue again. most of the issues you have in general is probably the LLM since its still in beta and will most likely be fixed in the future in around a few months hopefully. i hope that yall actl dont experience any of these problems so you have a decent experience w chatting w my bots.

𓏲⋆ ִֶָ ๋𓂃 ⋆ "why does it keep misgendering me?"

✮ when looking at my old bots reviews (posessive husband), i noticed someone pointing out that i had put 'straight' in the definition even tho i said it was [M4A]. i fixed this and im so thankful they pointed it out so i could fix it. sometimes i write 'straight' on accident for my [M4A] bots. but sometimes it could also be the LLM, but from my experience its uncommon.
